title: Mylo
description: Get an incredible performance boost along with an improved gameplay experience with this client-side multiplayer mod build.
body:
# For Mylo
Mods to optimize the game experience. The best client-side modifications are combined to improve the user experience. The collection is aimed at the fact that you will play with it on vanilla survival servers.
Additionally resourcepacks and many shaders are present

![banner img](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1077172761878859836/1395551064002134097/iDKpEMi.png?ex=687adbb5&is=68798a35&hm=22a79a469e2c5f01651208ef5b1f278eccea903ed411d19dacc9699623fde459&=&format=webp&quality=lossless&width=1392&height=597)

[Discord](https://discord.gg/mylo)
